ValidationRule.description: If Stage is RO Acceptance or RO Completed, Acceptance Result must be filled
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "RO Acceptance"), ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, "RO Completed") ), ISBLANK(TEXT(Acceptance_Result__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Acceptance Result is required when Stage is RO Acceptance or RO Completed
